title: Cursed Armor
description: Silly armor from things that Mojang didn't intend to have armor for
body:
<!-- SVG version -->
![fabric-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)

# Additions

## Emerald Armor
Made from crafting emeralds
## Amethyst Armor
Made from crafting amethyst shards
## Smooth Quartz Armor
Made from smelting quartz into smooth quartz and crafting them
## Full Turtle Armor
Made from turtle scute, like the turtle helmet but full armor set.
